title: Interactive Menus & Contribute Cards
description: Added dynamic interactions to the homescreen layout and introduced a dedicated contribution page.
changes: Implemented functional Three Dots menu on the homescreen BentoBox components (Minimize, Maximize, Close).
Created a new interactive Contribute page showcasing three distinct tier cards.
Updated the Hexagon menu to include the new Contribute route.

title: UI Components Polish
description: Introduced multiple new reusable UI components to enhance user interaction and site functionality.
changes: Added a Tool tip UI for better context on project feeds.
Implemented a Restricted textarea with character counting capabilities.
Built an Accordion component for collapsible content.
Introduced a new Cookie Consent banner with animated transitions.

title: Bento Box Layout & Contact Reform
description: Completely revamped the site layout and communication channels.
changes: Restructured 'About Me' and 'Skills' into a responsive, glassmorphic 'Bento Box' layout.
Reformed the Contact page with an interactive, validated React form.
